talk_metadata.institution_or_pharma: Harvard Chan School of Public Health
talk_metadata.talk_title: Adolescent adherence to the planetary health diet and breast cancer risk
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "Given the fact that there are limitations to our studies, especially the recalled aspect of the diet, additional prospective cohort studies are needed"
Speaker said: "If confirmed, a plant-forward adolescent diet may have dual benefits for breast cancer prevention as well as for planetary health"

key_data_gaps: Limited number of cases in ER‑negative subgroup (83 cases)

unresolved_questions: How does the adolescent diet effect compare quantitatively to adult diet effect?

talk_metadata.institution_or_pharma: Tianjin Medical University Cancer Institute and Hospital
talk_metadata.talk_title: Cardiorespiratory multimorbidity and lung cancer risk
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "It is reported that in CRD patients, the prevalence of CVD ranges from 30% to 70%"
Speaker said: "Healthy lifestyle was associated with 57% lower risk of progression from CRM to lung cancer"

vulnerability_identified.failing_compound_or_target: Cardiorespiratory multimorbidity as a risk marker
vulnerability_identified.mechanistic_blindspot: Potential residual confounding by smoking and occupational exposures not fully adjusted

key_data_gaps: No adjustment for competing risk explicitly discussed
Potential reverse causality not fully addressed

crispro_opportunity.description: Integrate CRD/CVD multimorbidity risk scores with CrisPRO's molecular risk models to improve lung cancer early detection
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "Healthy lifestyle was associated with 57% lower risk of progression from CRM to lung cancer"
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can add genomic and transcriptomic layers to the multimorbidity risk, refining high‑risk identification

unresolved_questions: How was competing risk handled in the multi‑state model?

talk_metadata.talk_title: Generational immigration status and gastric cancer incidence among Japanese descendants
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "The risk declines over generations but never fully converges"
Speaker said: "We did not have H. pylori data in the cohort"

crispro_opportunity.description: Develop a PRS or molecular risk score for gastric cancer in Japanese ancestry to complement generational risk assessment
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "Even for the third generation, the risk is increased compared to non‑Hispanic whites"
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can generate ancestry‑specific polygenic risk scores to identify high‑risk individuals beyond immigration status

unresolved_questions: Would inclusion of H. pylori serology alter the generational risk estimates?

talk_metadata.talk_title: PRIME: Parsimonious risk stratification model for pancreatic cancer
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "We did not use any sort of class weighting"
Speaker said: "We hope that if we're capturing real biological signal, our absolute risk predictions will be calibrated across different prevalences"

key_data_gaps: Potential inclusion of pre‑diagnostic workup codes

crispro_opportunity.description: Prospective validation of PRIME within a CrisPRO‑enabled trial combining PRS and EHR risk to select high‑risk individuals for biomarker testing
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "Prospective validation of this sort of model will be important"
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can provide genomic risk layers and simulation tools to optimize enrollment criteria

cited_competitors.name: NPAC
cited_competitors.context: Compared as a prior EHR model limited to new‑onset diabetes

cited_competitors.name: Cancer RiskNet
cited_competitors.context: Mentioned as a transformer model with reduced performance in US validation

unresolved_questions: How will the model handle dynamic risk factors over time?

talk_metadata.institution_or_pharma: University of Utah / Huntsman Cancer Institute
talk_metadata.talk_title: Basal metabolic rate and colorectal cancer survival
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "BMR may just be a correlate that correlates with other conditions that predict mortality but not really be causal"

key_data_gaps: No adjustment for frailty or functional status
BMR equations not validated in cancer patients

crispro_opportunity.description: Use CrisPRO to identify metabolic gene expression signatures that explain BMR‑survival association
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "BMR could be a correlate that correlates with other conditions that predict mortality"
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can integrate transcriptomic data to uncover pathways linking metabolism to outcomes

unresolved_questions: How does BMR correlate with imaging‑derived body composition metrics?

talk_metadata.talk_title: Telehealth disparities in older cancer patients
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "These barriers persisted over time"
Speaker said: "Provider characteristics may be highly effective for improving equitable access"

key_data_gaps: No outcome data linking telehealth use to cancer survival

crispro_opportunity.description: Combine telehealth utilization data with CrisPRO's risk stratification to target high‑risk patients for remote monitoring
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "Provider characteristics may be highly effective for improving equitable access"
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can prioritize patients based on molecular risk, enabling focused telehealth outreach

unresolved_questions: What specific digital literacy interventions can close the observed gaps?

talk_metadata.talk_title: CONFLUENCE Project: Multi‑ancestry GWAS of breast cancer
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "We have been able to identify 545 independent loci"
Speaker said: "There is still space to increase non‑European sample size"

key_data_gaps: Limited representation of rare African variants
PRS portability still suboptimal for some ancestries

crispro_opportunity.description: Leverage CrisPRO to refine ancestry‑specific PRS using CONFLUENCE summary statistics
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "Our engineered PRS outperforms the widely used 313 PRS across multiple ancestries"
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO's computational spine can integrate multi‑ancestry effect sizes and LD patterns to boost PRS performance

cited_competitors.name: 313‑variant breast cancer PRS
cited_competitors.context: Used as benchmark for performance comparison

unresolved_questions: How will rare variant associations be incorporated into risk models?
